title: Love Came To Us In Time Gone By
content:
Love came to us in time gone by
    When one at twilight shyly played
    And one in fear was standing nigh,
    For Love at first is all afraid.

    We were grave lovers. Love is past
    That had his sweet hours many a one;
    Welcome to us now at the last
    The ways that we shall go upon.
meaning:
James Joyce's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Love Came To Us In Time Gone By"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
